npcs.name: Thorvald the Guard
npcs.initialGreeting: Another soul venturing into the deep. You look capable enough — maybe you can help.

npcs.name: Sigrun the Scavenger
npcs.description: nimble scavenger with keen eyes and salvage gear
npcs.initialGreeting: Watch your step — these ruins shift when you're not looking.

npcs.name: Astrid the Jötun-Reader
npcs.description: lean woman with ink-stained fingers poring over ancient text fragments
npcs.initialGreeting: The old data-slates speak, if you know how to listen. Most don't.

npcs.name: Kjartan the Rust-Smith
npcs.description: barrel-chested Dvergr descendant working a makeshift forge from reclaimed machinery
npcs.initialGreeting: Bring me scrap and I'll forge you something worth carrying.

npcs.name: Gunnar the Raider
npcs.description: scarred veteran with rust-stained armor and a calculating gaze
npcs.initialGreeting: You don't look like Combine. That's either very good or very bad for you.

npcs.name: Rolf the Hermit
npcs.description: gaunt old man living alone in a sealed maintenance alcove, surrounded by salvaged relics
npcs.initialGreeting: ...you found me. Means you're either very lost or very determined.

npcs.name: Bjorn the Exile
npcs.description: wild-eyed exile with strange symbols carved into his skin, muttering about sleeping gods
npcs.initialGreeting: The Jötun dream. We are their nightmares made flesh. You feel it too, don't you?

npcs.name: Kjartan the Merchant
npcs.description: shrewd trader with a well-stocked pack and a keen eye for value
npcs.initialGreeting: Need supplies? I've got the best salvage this side of the Roots.
